title: API latency spike
summary: Elevated p95 latency on the public API is causing intermittent timeouts for customers in North America.
description: Response times increased sharply after the latest deployment window. The team is reviewing recent infra changes, draining a noisy node pool, and validating cache health across the primary region.

notes.author: Avery Chen
notes.body: Rollback is on hold while we compare node-level saturation against yesterday's baseline.

notes.author: Jordan Lee
notes.body: Customer-facing status page updated with elevated latency advisory.

timeline.title: Incident opened
timeline.detail: Automated alert triggered after sustained latency breached the critical threshold.

timeline.title: Investigation in progress
timeline.detail: Traffic shifted away from the busiest node group while the team reviews deployment diffs.

title: Webhook retries delayed
summary: Outgoing webhook retries are accumulating in the queue, delaying downstream delivery for some integrations.
description: The retry worker pool is healthy, but queue depth is growing due to a burst of failed attempts from a partner endpoint. Teams are evaluating temporary rate shaping and replay priorities.

notes.author: Priya Raman
notes.body: No data loss observed so far; delayed retries remain replayable.

timeline.title: Incident opened
timeline.detail: Queue depth exceeded the warning threshold for ten consecutive minutes.

title: Status page stale cache
summary: Status page components served stale cache content after a CDN configuration drift.
description: Static status widgets were not refreshing because the CDN edge cache max-age was applied incorrectly during a policy rollout. The configuration has been corrected and verified.

notes.author: Morgan Diaz
notes.body: Cache policy corrected and propagation confirmed across primary regions.

timeline.title: Incident opened
timeline.detail: Customer reports showed a mismatch between internal health and public status page messaging.

timeline.title: System stable
timeline.detail: Fresh cache entries are now being served and validation checks are passing.
